Title: Admin login with valid credentials
Steps: 1) Open /admin/login 2) Enter valid email+password 3) Click Login
ExpectedResult: User is logged in and redirected to Dashboard; success toast shown

Title: Admin login with invalid password
Steps: 1) Open /admin/login 2) Enter valid email + invalid password 3) Click Login
ExpectedResult: Login is rejected; error message displayed; user remains on login page

Title: Forgot password sends reset link
Steps: 1) Open Forgot Password 2) Enter email 3) Submit
ExpectedResult: Reset link email is queued/sent; confirmation message displayed

Title: Logout ends session
ExpectedResult: Session is invalidated; redirected to login; cannot access protected routes

Title: Dashboard accessible with permission
ExpectedResult: Dashboard loads successfully

Title: Dashboard blocked without permission
ExpectedResult: Access denied/403 or redirected per middleware; no data shown

Title: Create role with permissions
Steps: 1) Open Roles 2) Click Create Role 3) Enter role name 4) Select permissions 5) Save
ExpectedResult: Role is created; permissions are assigned; success toast shown

Title: Role name unique validation
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; role 'admin' exists
ExpectedResult: Validation error shown for duplicate name; role not created

Title: Edit role name
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; role exists
Steps: 1) Open role edit 2) Change name 3) Save
ExpectedResult: Role updated; success toast shown

Title: Delete non super-admin role
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; role exists and is not super-admin
ExpectedResult: Role deleted; table reloads; success toast shown

Title: Cannot delete super-admin
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; role=super-admin exists
ExpectedResult: Deletion blocked; error toast/message shown; role remains

Title: Create permission
Steps: 1) Open Permissions 2) Click Create 3) Enter name 4) Save
ExpectedResult: Permission created; appears in list; success toast shown

Title: Edit permission description
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; permission exists
ExpectedResult: Permission updated; success toast shown

Title: Delete permission
Preconditions: Logged in user has role_access; permission exists
ExpectedResult: Permission deleted; list refreshes; success toast shown

Title: Create user assigns roles
Preconditions: Logged in user has user_access; roles exist
Steps: 1) Open Users 2) Create User 3) Fill required fields 4) Assign roles 5) Save
ExpectedResult: User created; roles assigned; password email sent; success toast shown

Title: Email must be unique
Preconditions: Logged in user has user_access; user with email exists
ExpectedResult: Validation error shown; user not created

Title: Filter users by status
Preconditions: Logged in user has user_access; multiple users exist with active/disabled
Steps: 1) Open Users 2) Change status filter to Disabled
ExpectedResult: Table reloads; only disabled users shown

Title: Search user list
Preconditions: Logged in user has user_access; users exist
ExpectedResult: Table reloads; matching users shown

Title: Create shift
Steps: 1) Open Shifts 2) Create Shift 3) Enter name/start/end 4) Save
ExpectedResult: Shift created; success toast shown

Title: End time must be after start time
Steps: 1) Create shift with end before start
ExpectedResult: Validation error shown; shift not created

Title: Search shifts list
Preconditions: Logged in user has shift_access; shifts exist
ExpectedResult: Table reloads; matching shifts shown

Title: Delete shift shows toast
Preconditions: Logged in user has shift_access; shift exists
ExpectedResult: Shift deleted via AJAX; table reloads; success toast shown

Title: Create task with rich text description
Steps: 1) Open Tasks 2) Create Task 3) Enter title 4) Enter description in editor 5) Save
ExpectedResult: Task created; success toast shown; description renders on view page

Title: Description required validation
Steps: 1) Create task with empty editor content 2) Save
ExpectedResult: Validation error shown for description; task not created

Title: Search tasks list
Preconditions: Logged in user has task_access; tasks exist
ExpectedResult: Table reloads; tasks filtered by title/description

Title: Delete task shows toast
Preconditions: Logged in user has task_access; task exists
ExpectedResult: Task deleted via AJAX; table reloads; success toast shown

Title: Open roster page
Preconditions: Logged in user can access roster page
ExpectedResult: Roster page loads without errors

Title: Roster requires authentication
ExpectedResult: Redirected to login

Title: Create page with CKEditor description
Steps: 1) Open Pages 2) Create 3) Fill fields inc. description editor 4) Save
ExpectedResult: Page created; success toast shown

Title: Create template with editor body
Steps: 1) Open Email Templates 2) Create 3) Fill name/subject/body 4) Save
ExpectedResult: Template created; success toast shown

Title: Update website settings
ExpectedResult: Settings updated; success toast shown

Title: Update profile details
ExpectedResult: Profile updated; success toast shown
